items.title: At World Cup Ticket Prices, Even Messi Can’t Fill a Stadium
items.summary: The Argentine team and its superstar, Lionel Messi, have been among the biggest draws at the World Cup, but that was not enough to prevent vacant seats at its quarterfinal on Sa...

items.title: US insists Strait of Hormuz is open as it exchanges strikes with Iran
items.summary: Iranian forces earlier said the Strait was closed and launched wide-ranging attacks at US allies and bases in the region.
